mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_legal_permit WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY expire_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_legal_permit WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_permit WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_legal_permit WHERE deleted = 0 AND expire_date IS NOT NULL AND DATEDIFF(DAY, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE), expire_date) BETWEEN 0 AND #{days}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_legal_permit ( permit_type, category, permit_name, base_law, agency, permit_no, issue_date, expire_date, owner_name, renewal_period, conditions, icon, deleted, created_at, modified_at ) VALUES ( #{permitType}, #{category}, #{permitName}, #{baseLaw}, #{agency}, #{permitNo}, #{issueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{expireDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{ownerName}, #{renewalPeriod}, #{conditions}, #{icon}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_legal_permit SET permit_type = #{permitType}, category = #{category}, permit_name = #{permitName}, base_law = #{baseLaw}, agency = #{agency}, permit_no = #{permitNo}, issue_date = #{issueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, expire_date = #{expireDate,jdbcType=DATE}, owner_name = #{ownerName}, renewal_period = #{renewalPeriod}, conditions = #{conditions}, icon = #{icon}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_legal_permit SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
